GD-MAIN.Annotation: Portable OpenCode workflow package with server and TUI plugins, a Bun CLI, semantic model roles, context inspection, hashline editing, explicit work items, and managed agent workflows.

M-MODEL-ROLES.Name: ModelRoles
M-MODEL-ROLES.Purpose: Define built-in role IDs, vv-role:* syntax, model-selection parsing, role normalization, resolution helpers, and built-in agent role bindings.

M-CONFIG-LAYERS.Name: ConfigLayers
M-CONFIG-LAYERS.Purpose: Resolve vvoc, OpenCode runtime, and dedicated OpenCode TUI config sources across env, project, global, and defaults plus project/global write targets.

M-CLI-CONFIG.Name: OpenCodeConfigTools
M-CLI-CONFIG.Purpose: Mutate OpenCode runtime/TUI and vvoc config conservatively, pin base package registrations, migrate legacy TUI subpath specs, preserve tuple options, inspect OpenCode host compatibility, write managed agent/skill registrations, and render strict schema v3.
M-CLI-CONFIG.Paths: src/lib/opencode.ts, src/lib/package.ts, src/lib/vvoc-config.ts, src/lib/model-roles.ts, src/lib/vvoc-paths.ts, schemas/vvoc/v3.json
M-CLI-CONFIG.Depends: M-CONFIG-LAYERS, M-MODEL-ROLES, M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY, M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS, M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS, M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS

M-RELEASE-AUTOMATION.Name: ReleaseAutomation
M-RELEASE-AUTOMATION.Purpose: Guard package exports and releases with source-path checks, deterministic OpenTUI Solid test preloading, isolated local TUI smoke launches, local version bumping, AI changelog summary generation, schema id consistency, exact-SHA CI publication, CI-result waiting, bounded npm metadata retry and gitHead verification, and authenticated local tag/GitHub Release finalization.
M-RELEASE-AUTOMATION.Paths: bunfig.toml, scripts/check-exports.ts, scripts/tui-local.ts, scripts/release-bump.ts, scripts/release-bump.test.ts, scripts/release-check.ts, scripts/release-summary.ts, .github/workflows/publish.yml, schemas/vvoc/v3.json
M-RELEASE-AUTOMATION.Depends: M-CLI-CONFIG, M-CLI-COMMANDS, @opentui/solid, git CLI, gh CLI, GitHub Actions, npm trusted publishing

M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.Name: ManagedAgents
M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS.Purpose: Define bundled vv-controller, enhancer, guardian, investigator, vv-implementer, vv-spec-reviewer, and vv-code-reviewer templates and load managed prompt text.

M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS.Name: ManagedSkills
M-CLI-MANAGED-SKILLS.Purpose: Define bundled vv-spec, vv-plan, vv-review, vv-execute, vv-reflect, and vv-handoff skill templates and reference loading.

M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS.Name: AgentModels
M-CLI-AGENT-MODELS.Purpose: Define supported vvoc model target IDs and shared model override validation helpers retained for current command and config compatibility.

M-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CONFIG.Name: PluginToggleConfig
M-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CONFIG.Purpose: Define vvoc-managed server and TUI plugin toggle names, default all-true config, and pure isPluginEnabled helper.

M-CLI-COMMANDS.Name: VVOCCommands
M-CLI-COMMANDS.Purpose: Compose the vvoc CLI and expose init, install, sync, launch, status, doctor, version, role, preset, plugin, config, patch-provider, completion, guardian config, and upgrade commands, including managed TUI registration and OpenCode host compatibility diagnostics.

M-PLUGIN-MODEL-ROLES.Name: ModelRolesPlugin
M-PLUGIN-MODEL-ROLES.Purpose: Resolve vv-role:* references in supported OpenCode root, agent, and command model fields using effective vvoc config source precedence.

M-CLI-ROLE.Name: RoleCommand
M-CLI-ROLE.Purpose: List, set, and unset semantic role assignments in selected vvoc config for built-in and custom roles.

M-CLI-PRESET.Name: PresetCommand
M-CLI-PRESET.Purpose: List, show, and atomically apply declarative role and orchestration presets without mutating OpenCode config.

M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY.Name: VvocPresetRegistry
M-VVOC-PRESET-REGISTRY.Purpose: Define canonical managed preset role and orchestration definitions for config seeding, sync refresh, and completion.

M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.Name: GuardianPlugin
M-PLUGIN-GUARDIAN.Purpose: Review OpenCode permission requests with a constrained hidden Guardian subagent whose model resolves from the built-in fast role.

M-PLUGIN-HASHLINE-EDIT.Name: HashlineEditPlugin
M-PLUGIN-HASHLINE-EDIT.Purpose: Replace default edit with a hash-anchored variant and rewrite read output to line/hash/context-anchor rows to reject stale edits before file corruption.

M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.Name: SystemContextInjectionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SYSTEM-CONTEXT-INJECTION.Purpose: Inject universal primary guidance and one startup-resolved orchestration policy into vv-controller while skipping subagents.

M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.Name: SecretsRedactionPlugin
M-PLUGIN-SECRETS-REDACTION.Purpose: Redact secrets from provider-bound messages and restore placeholders after completions and before local tool execution.

M-PLUGIN-CONTEXT-TUI.Name: ContextTuiPlugin
M-PLUGIN-CONTEXT-TUI.Purpose: Register /context in the OpenCode TUI, combine latest provider-reported usage with honest observable category estimates, derive reconciled per-tool and per-MCP schema/history attribution and context-limit percentages, disclose schema catalogs unavailable through public OpenCode APIs, render a bounded Overview/Tools/MCP dialog, and fail softly on missing or ambiguous state.

M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL.Name: WorkflowProtocol
M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL.Purpose: Define tracked subagent result protocol grammar, allowed statuses, strict top-block and separated-body parsing, actionable missing-blank-line diagnostics, status validation, and work-item header parsing.

M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR.Name: WorkflowRepair
M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR.Purpose: Recognize resumable OpenCode task-result envelopes and attempt one bounded same-session format repair for malformed tracked outputs, including missing-blank-line body separator guidance.

M-WORKFLOW-STATE.Name: WorkflowState
M-WORKFLOW-STATE.Purpose: Store explicit work-item state, lifecycle, reviewer roles, current round, counters, bounded result excerpts, in-flight launches, and persistence delegate integration.

M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS.Name: WorkflowTransitions
M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS.Purpose: Compute allowed tracked agents, reviewer role mappings, full-round settlement, hard-stop handling, and round limit checks.

M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING.Name: WorkflowTooling
M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING.Purpose: Provide work_item_open, work_item_list, and work_item_close custom tool handlers over the state store, including stable serialization of bounded recovery excerpts.

M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.Name: WorkflowPlugin
M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.Purpose: Register workflow tools, enforce tracked launch validation, parse tracked results, repair malformed outputs, propagate bounded excerpts through hard stops, and inject profile-compatible workflow guidance.
M-PLUGIN-WORKFLOW.Depends: M-WORKFLOW-PROTOCOL, M-WORKFLOW-REPAIR, M-WORKFLOW-STATE, M-WORKFLOW-TRANSITIONS, M-WORKFLOW-TOOLING, M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE, M-ORCHESTRATION-PROFILES, M-CLI-MANAGED-AGENTS, M-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CONFIG

M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE.Name: WorkflowPersistence
M-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE.Purpose: Hydrate and snapshot per-session workflow state, including optional bounded result excerpt fields, under $XDG_DATA_HOME/vvoc/workflow/<sessionId>/workflow-state.json and delete session directories on cleanup.

M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.Name: ConfigValidate
M-CLI-CONFIG-VALIDATE.Purpose: Validate canonical strict-current vvoc.json against schema v3 and semantic role/preset constraints.

M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.Name: PluginList
M-CLI-PLUGIN-LIST.Purpose: Display OpenCode plugin entries with source path, enabled status, and vvoc plugin toggle status where available.

M-CLI-PLUGIN-TOGGLE.Name: PluginToggle
M-CLI-PLUGIN-TOGGLE.Purpose: Enable or disable vvoc-managed plugins by mutating the plugins section in selected canonical vvoc config.

M-CLI-PATCH-PROVIDER.Name: PatchProvider
M-CLI-PATCH-PROVIDER.Purpose: Apply provider-specific OpenCode baseURL or alias-model patches without rewriting role-reference root model fields.

M-CLI-COMPLETION.Name: Completion
M-CLI-COMPLETION.Purpose: Install bash, zsh, and fish completions including role IDs, presets, orchestration, patch-provider presets, and nested commands.

M-CLI-INIT.Name: Init
M-CLI-INIT.Purpose: Interactive or non-interactive project setup that registers the package, scaffolds managed prompts, seeds role assignments, and writes role-reference config defaults.

M-CLI-UPGRADE.Name: Upgrade
M-CLI-UPGRADE.Purpose: Check npm for newer package versions, install globally with Bun, and run follow-up sync while reporting sync failure as partial upgrade.

M-ORCHESTRATION-PROFILES.Name: OrchestrationProfiles
M-ORCHESTRATION-PROFILES.Purpose: Define profile names, backward-compatible defaults, strict parsing, and one concrete vv-controller policy per profile.

M-CLI-ORCHESTRATION.Name: OrchestrationCommand
M-CLI-ORCHESTRATION.Purpose: Show scoped effective profile and source without mutation; set explicit profiles with bootstrap, preservation, and restart guidance.

GD-MAIN.DF-PLUGIN-INSTALL: vvoc init or install resolves config paths, registers the pinned base package for both server and TUI loading, syncs managed agents and skills, writes canonical vvoc schema v3, and verifies status.
GD-MAIN.DF-CONFIG-SYNC: vvoc sync strict-parses current vvoc config, preserves valid role/plugin values and unrelated TUI JSONC entries, refreshes managed presets/prompts/skills, and rewrites managed runtime/TUI registrations.
GD-MAIN.DF-LAYERED-CONFIG: Commands and runtime resolve vvoc, OpenCode runtime, and OpenCode TUI env overrides, nearest project layer, global layer, then defaults where permitted.
GD-MAIN.DF-VVOC-LAUNCH: vvoc launch selects OpenCode runtime and vvoc config paths, conditionally pins an existing TUI config with OPENCODE_TUI_CONFIG, forwards passthrough args, and preserves child exit code.
GD-MAIN.DF-RELEASE: tui:local builds and injects the local TUI export through an isolated temporary config for pre-release smoke testing; release:bump creates and pushes an exact release commit, dispatches and waits for publish.yml, CI verifies all gates before npm publication, then the local authenticated process retries npm metadata, verifies gitHead, and creates the annotated tag plus GitHub Release.
GD-MAIN.DF-ROLE-MANAGEMENT: role list/set/unset loads selected vvoc config, validates role IDs, normalizes assignments, writes role map, or renders inventory.
GD-MAIN.DF-ROLE-RESOLUTION: ModelRolesPlugin loads role map, scans supported model fields, resolves vv-role:* references, splits variants where safe, and fails loudly for unknown roles.
GD-MAIN.DF-PRESET-SWITCH: Preset command reads presets, validates selected name, normalizes role and orchestration assignments, applies declared fields atomically, and leaves OpenCode config untouched.
GD-MAIN.DF-HASHLINE-EDIT: Hashline plugin rewrites read output to line/hash anchors, validates current anchors on edit, applies batches, and rejects stale or malformed anchors.
GD-MAIN.DF-GUARDIAN-REVIEW: Guardian captures permission intent, builds bounded review input, runs hidden subagent, interprets risk, and auto-replies only when safe.
GD-MAIN.DF-SYSTEM-CONTEXT: System context injection resolves agent identity, selects one concrete orchestration policy for vv-controller, and appends universal plus profile-specific guidance only to eligible agents.
GD-MAIN.DF-SECRETS-REDACTION: SecretsRedactionPlugin redacts provider-bound payloads, restores after completions, and restores before tool execution.
GD-MAIN.DF-PLUGIN-LIST: Plugin list scans OpenCode config and displays source plus vvoc toggle status when selected vvoc config is valid.
GD-MAIN.DF-CONFIG-VALIDATE: Config validate resolves selected vvoc.json, parses strict JSON, validates schema v3 and semantic role/preset constraints.
GD-MAIN.DF-COMPLETION: Completion detects shell, generates completion content, writes shell-specific files, and patches shell init files idempotently when required.
GD-MAIN.DF-PLUGIN-TOGGLE: Plugin enable/disable resolves vvoc config, validates plugin name, writes plugins[name], and prints restart guidance.
GD-MAIN.DF-PLUGIN-TOGGLE-CHECK: Plugin factories load shared runtime config, call isPluginEnabled, return empty hooks when disabled, or proceed normally when enabled.
GD-MAIN.DF-INIT: Init chooses interactive/non-interactive path, prompts when appropriate, writes managed prompts/config, and confirms setup.
GD-MAIN.DF-UPGRADE: Upgrade checks npm, installs latest globally with Bun, runs fresh vvoc sync, and reports partial upgrade if sync fails.
GD-MAIN.DF-RENAME-AGENTS: Install/sync scaffolds vv-implementer, vv-spec-reviewer, and vv-code-reviewer names and prompt files while preserving pre-rename user-owned entries.
GD-MAIN.DF-WORKFLOW-TOOLS: work_item_open/list/close create, inspect, and close explicit workflow items with deterministic IDs, state metadata, review-round metadata, and bounded recovery excerpts.
GD-MAIN.DF-LAUNCH-ENFORCEMENT: WorkflowPlugin intercepts task launches, validates tracked subagent prompts, work-item existence, allowed transitions, and round limits.
GD-MAIN.DF-RESULT-PARSING: WorkflowPlugin parses tracked subagent top blocks and separated result bodies, unwraps task envelopes, attempts bounded format repair, validates identity/status, creates bounded recovery excerpts, updates state, and halts with excerpt context on protocol errors or hard-stop statuses.
GD-MAIN.DF-LOOP-GATE: Workflow round checks use max(specReviewCount, codeReviewCount) and block round three.
GD-MAIN.DF-WORKFLOW-GUIDANCE: WorkflowPlugin injects profile-compatible reviewer-only, selective, or tracked protocol guidance into vv-controller and skips helper primaries and subagents.
GD-MAIN.DF-WORKFLOW-PERSISTENCE: Workflow persistence hydrates per-session state including optional bounded excerpt fields, snapshots after mutations, switches session stores, and cleans deleted session data.
GD-MAIN.DF-CONTEXT-INSPECTION: The /context command reuses active TUI state, current tool catalogs, model metadata, and MCP status; starts at the latest compaction summary; computes provider-measured usage plus approximate categories, per-tool schema/history, deterministic MCP aggregates, context-limit percentages, and drift; then renders a bounded scrollable Overview/Tools/MCP host dialog.
GD-MAIN.DF-ORCHESTRATION-PROFILE: Preset or CLI writes a root profile, startup config resolves it once, and prompt plugins inject only the concrete vv-controller and workflow guidance for that profile.

ManualReview.Item: Function-level START_CONTRACT and START_BLOCK anchors remain source-local navigation structure and are intentionally not expanded into separate graph modules.
